meta.name: Grit-S Short Grit Scale
meta.description: The Grit-S is an 8-item measure of trait-level perseverance and passion for long-term goals. It includes two subscales: Consistency of Interest and Perseverance of Effort.
meta.author: Duckworth & Quinn (2009)
meta.reference: Duckworth AL, Quinn PD. Development and validation of the Short Grit Scale (Grit-S). J Pers Assess. 2009;91(2):166-174.
meta.instruction: Please respond to each item using the scale below. Be honest; there are no right or wrong answers.

questions.text: New ideas and projects sometimes distract me from previous ones
I have been obsessed with a certain idea or project for a short time but later lost interest
I often set a goal but later choose to pursue a different one
I have difficulty maintaining my focus on projects that take more than a few months to complete

ranges.label: Low Grit
ranges.description: Your grit score is low, suggesting difficulty maintaining long-term goals and effort.
suggestions: Try setting smaller, achievable goals as stepping stones
Practice committing to one project at a time
Reflect on what truly matters to you long-term
Consider working with a coach or mentor

ranges.label: Below Average Grit
ranges.description: Your grit is below average. You may sometimes struggle with maintaining focus on long-term goals.
suggestions: Identify your core passions and align goals accordingly
Build habits that support daily consistency
Track your progress to stay motivated
Learn from setbacks rather than being discouraged by them

ranges.label: Above Average Grit
ranges.description: Your grit is above average. You generally maintain effort and interest in your long-term goals.
suggestions: Share your strategies for persistence with others
Challenge yourself with increasingly ambitious goals

ranges.label: High Grit
ranges.description: Your grit score is high. You demonstrate strong perseverance and sustained passion for your long-term goals.
suggestions: Ensure you also allow flexibility when goals need adjusting
Use your grit as a strength to inspire others
